{{Infobox artifact
| name = Purple Feather Elixir
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Purple Feather Elixir]] is a pill that helps advance a [[madra]] base without tapping into a [[Remnant]].}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
